workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: ~/.nakiros/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
YOU MUST ALWAYS SPEAK OUTPUT in the configured communication_language.
Execute ALL steps in exact order; do NOT skip steps.

step.action: Load profile config from {profile_config} when available (optional).
Apply defaults when missing: communication_language={default_communication_language}, document_language={default_document_language}.

Resolve workspace scope from {workspace_config}. If the repo pointer exists, read `workspace_slug` from `{project-root}/_nakiros/workspace.yaml`, then load `~/.nakiros/workspaces/{workspace_slug}/workspace.yaml` as the canonical workspace map. If the pointer is missing, continue in single-repo mode rooted at {project-root}.
Set {{workspace_repo_list}} from canonical workspace yaml `repos`. In single-repo fallback mode, set it to the current repo only.
Set {{pm_tool}} from canonical workspace yaml `workspace.pm_tool`, defaulting to "none" when absent.
Set {{is_multi_repo}} = true when canonical workspace yaml `workspace.structure` is `multi-repo` or more than one repo is listed; otherwise false.

Load workspace-global context first by calling context.workspace.get for keys product, global, interRepo, and architecture when available. Use this as the frame for sprint goals, sequencing, and cross-repo risks.
Ensure directories exist: {sprints_dir}, {reports_dir}.
step.output: [SPRINT] Étape 1/5 — Load configuration ✓ Config loaded | PM: {{pm_tool or "standalone"}} | Workspace: {{is_multi_repo ? "multi-repo" : "single-repo"}}

step.ask:
What are we doing?
---
**What would you like to do?**
1. Retrospective — review the sprint that just ended 2. Planning — plan the next sprint 3. Both — retro then plan
step.action: Capture as {{sprint_mode}}: "retro" / "planning" / "both".
Capture as {{sprint_name}}.

check.action: Fetch current sprint board state via the configured Nakiros PM integration: - All tickets in sprint {{sprint_name}} with status - Assignees, story points if available

check.ask: Paste the ticket list for sprint {{sprint_name}} (one per line: ID — title — status):

step.output: [SPRINT] Étape 2/5 — Sprint context ✓ Sprint context loaded: {{sprint_name}} | {{done_count}} done / {{in_progress_count}} in progress / {{todo_count}} to do

step.action: Analyze {{sprint_tickets}} for completion rate: {{done_count}} / {{total_count}} = {{completion_pct}}%.

check.action: For each repo in {{workspace_repo_list}}, run: git log --oneline --since={{sprint_start_date}} --until={{sprint_end_date}} to gather commit activity.
Correlate commits to ticket IDs found in commit messages.

step.ask: What went well this sprint? (list freely — we'll structure it)
step.action: Capture as {{went_well}}.
step.ask: What could be improved? (blockers, process friction, surprises)
step.action: Capture as {{to_improve}}.
step.ask: Any action items for the team? (optional)
step.action: Capture as {{action_items}} (may be empty).

check.action: Post retro summary as a comment on the sprint or team channel via the configured Nakiros PM integration (if supported).
Transition leftover in-progress tickets to {pm_todo_status} for backlog review (ask confirmation first).

step.output: [SPRINT] Étape 3/5 — Retrospective ✓ Retrospective complete — {{completion_pct}}% completion | Artifact: {reports_dir}/retro-{{sprint_name | slugify}}.md

step.action: Capture as {{next_sprint_name}}.

check.action: Fetch backlog tickets (status = {pm_todo_status}, not in any sprint) via the configured Nakiros PM integration.
Capture as {{backlog_tickets}} with priority, story points, labels, assignee.

check.ask: Paste the backlog tickets to consider for {{next_sprint_name}} (ID — title — priority):

step.ask: Team capacity for {{next_sprint_name}}? (story points or number of devs × days)
step.action: Capture as {{capacity}}.

Analyze backlog and propose a sprint scope: - Prioritize by: priority label, dependencies, team capacity - Flag tickets that are too large (need splitting) or have unresolved dependencies - Include any tickets carried forward from {{sprint_name}} if sprint_mode is 'both' - Target total ≤ {{capacity}}
Present proposed sprint scope to the user for validation.
step.ask: Adjust the scope? (add / remove tickets, or confirm as-is)
step.action: Capture final scope as {{confirmed_sprint_scope}}.

check.action: For each ticket in {{confirmed_sprint_scope}}: assign to sprint {{next_sprint_name}} via the configured Nakiros PM integration.
If assignees are specified, assign tickets.

step.output: [SPRINT] Étape 4/5 — Sprint planning ✓ Planning complete — {{confirmed_sprint_scope | count}} tickets in {{next_sprint_name}} | Artifact: {sprints_dir}/plan-{{next_sprint_name | slugify}}.md

step.action: Collect all artifact paths produced in this session.
